assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Step 1.3 includes commands to check current cluster version, node pool versions, cluster health with kubectl get nodes, and unhealthy pods

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 2.1 includes gcloud container get-server-config commands to list available versions and verify 1.33 availability

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Step 2.2 provides kubectl commands to check for deprecated API usage including kubectl api-resources command

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Step 3.1 includes exact command: gcloud container clusters upgrade $CLUSTER_NAME --master --cluster-version=1.33 --zone $ZONE

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 3.3 includes verification commands to check master version and test cluster connectivity

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Steps 4.1 and 4.4 provide exact gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools directly to 1.33 (skip-level upgrade)

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Steps 4.2 and 4.5 include watch commands for nodes, operations monitoring, and pod status during upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Control plane upgrade is sequential (1.32→1.33) and node pools are upgraded directly to 1.33 (skip-level)

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Step 5 includes comprehensive validation: cluster version check, node versions, system pods, and application functionality testing

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes both troubleshooting commands section and rollback plan section with specific commands and limitations
